articles.title: Eight people shot in Coney Island, including four children, NYPD says - NBC News
articles.description: At least eight people, including four children, were shot late Saturday night in Brooklyn’s Coney Island, leaving one woman in critical condition.

articles.description: Thomas Tuchel dismisses concerns over England's treatment in Mexico, saying it has been "nicer than I expected" and that home fans are "friendly and respectful".

articles.title: Taylor Swift Wedding Details: Adam Sandler, Blank Space Handkerchiefs - The Hollywood Reporter
articles.description: Jason Kelce's daughters reportedly served as flower girls, with Swift's aunt, Robin Gentry, sharing to the media as she left the event, "They cried, and they laughed, and they danced, and they hugged, and they kissed."

articles.description: Shohei Ohtani will be joined by three Los Angeles teammates in the NL's starting lineup, while the Dodgers, Braves and Phillies will each send five players to the July 14 All-Star Game.

articles.title: Rep. Nancy Pelosi's husband, Paul, faces charge for Napa County hit-and-run - KCRA
articles.description: Paul Pelosi, the husband for former House Speaker Nancy Pelosi, is facing a hit-and-run charge, according to the Napa County Sheriff's Office.
